_meta.purpose: Per-platform performance baselines for tests/performance/. Keyed by `${process.platform}-${cpuModelSlug}`. Tests look up their platform's row; if absent, they log timings without asserting (lets the suite stay green on new platforms while the baseline is captured).

<test-name>.noise_floor_pct: expected jitter (used as a × multiplier when asserting)
<test-name>.captured_at: ISO date when baseline was recorded

_meta.regenerate: Set MEMORY_PERF_RECORD=1 and run `npm run bench`; tests will write fresh rows for the active platform.
